pull.title: Full Libevent removal
pull.body:
This builds on all the work done by fjahr and pinheadmz to fully remove libevent from the codebase.

Closes #31194.

events.body: The following sections might be updated with supplementary metadata relevant to reviewers and maintainers. ### Code Coverage & Benchmarks For details see: https://corecheck.dev/bitcoin/bitcoin/pulls/34411. ### Reviews See [the guideline](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#code-review) for information on the review process. | Type | Reviewers | | ---- | --------- | | ACK | [fjahr](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34411#issuecomment-4777329101), [dergoegge](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34411#issuecomment-4777711853), [pinheadmz](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34411#pullrequestreview-4554284357), [sedited](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34411#pullrequestreview-4554420650) | | Concept ACK | [achow101](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34411#issuecomment-4772279443), [hebasto](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34411#pullrequestreview-4553032421) | If your review is incorrectly listed, please copy-paste <!--meta-tag:bot-skip--> into the comment that the bot should ignore. ### Conflicts Reviewers, this pull request conflicts with the following ones: * [#31425](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/31425) (RFC: Riscv bare metal CI job by sedited) If you consider this pull request important, please also help to review the conflicting pull requests. Ideally, start with the one that should be merged first.
nit: Pull request description should be replaced by the lyrics of Taylor Swift's _"We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together"_ before merging.
Rebased on master, and the latest versions of #32061 and #34342.
@dergoegge want to run this in antithesis?

Concept ACK

To fix the CI failure, the first 2 commits need to be squashed. Otherwise, CI will be attempting to run the first commit in an environment without libevent, but that commit still requires libevent to exist.
concept ACK, did a guix build as well, nothing freaked out there.

Concept ACK

~~Seems like this should rebase again to fix CI~~ and I would like to see the comment changed. Otherwise I am ready to full ACK this, I already reviewed all the changes, grepped for potentially missing bits etc. Everything looks to good to me.

EDIT: Assumed another previously seen issue with CI, ignore and see @achow101 's comment for the CI fix.

events.body:
146b3adfaa19070ff88b202df865bb9fca4336b6

`pkgconf`/`pkg-config` is no longer a strict requirement. However, it may still be needed to [find](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/146b3adfaa19070ff88b202df865bb9fca4336b6/cmake/module/FindZeroMQ.cmake#L31) the `ZeroMQ` package on systems where it is shipped without CMake config files. It is also optional for [finding](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/146b3adfaa19070ff88b202df865bb9fca4336b6/cmake/module/FindQRencode.cmake#L17) the `QRencode` package.

ACK 146b3adfaa19070ff88b202df865bb9fca4336b6

Reviewed changes, nothing besides libevent removed. grep is clean. built on macos/arm64 and debian/x86. guix build suceeded (will run again on top commit). no problems running daemon or Qt-gui, making RPC calls. Fuzzer builds and runs fine.

¡ADIÓS! 👋
